text.title: lang-swift-harmonize-arch-tests Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for lang-swift-harmonize-arch-tests as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Adding Sources/Domain/User.swift to Harmonize's excludedPaths to make the failing test green.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Excludes are meant for generated code; using them as an agent escape hatch turns the architecture suite into a no-op file-by-file.

failure-mode.description: Migrating tests to Swift Testing piecemeal but disabling the XCTest target instead of using the ST-0021 interop, leaving entire legacy suites unrun.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The interop is what makes incremental migration safe; turning off XCTest leaves a coverage gap exactly while the rewrite is in progress.
